\tzpentry{ID3503}{Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3503 introduces Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ B=\nabla\times A_{\rm dipole},\qquad E=-\partial_t A - \nabla\Phi. \]
